description_long: This is a three-seater couch with a sturdy wooden frame and deep blue upholstered cushions. The seat and backrest are both generously padded, with the backrest divided into three distinct, vertically-aligned sections. The upholstery features a subtle, woven texture that adds visual interest to the otherwise solid blue fabric. The armrests are made of wood, matching the base and legs, and are straight with a slatted design on the sides. The legs are short, blocky, and exposed, providing stable support. The overall design is functional and robust, suitable for public or semi-public urban environments such as parks, waiting areas, or community spaces.
description: A robust three-seater couch with blue textured upholstery, wooden frame, and straight wooden armrests. The backrest is divided into three padded sections, and the legs are short and blocky.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the solid wooden back and the three distinct backrest cushions.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the straight wooden armrest and the depth of the seat cushion.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the three padded backrest sections, wide seat, and both wooden armrests.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the matching wooden armrest and the full length of the seat.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, vertically-aligned backrest cushions and a single wide seat cushion, all attached and integrated into the frame; no accent or throw pillows visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is a solid blue fabric with a subtle, woven texture pattern; no visible decorative stitching or motifs.
attribute_leg_style: Short, blocky, exposed wooden legs with a rectangular profile, matching the wooden frame and armrests.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, horizontal wooden armrests with a slatted side design, medium height, and no padding.
attribute_backrest_type: High, divided backrest with three attached, cushioned sections; each section is rectangular and vertically aligned.
